new_terms.context: Mentioned as one of the three L10 level compute tray assembly partners for the Rubin platform.
One of the key ODM partners for Rubin platform assembly.
Main supplier for L6 board level PCBA and L10 compute tray assembly.
Refers to L6 board level assembly (Printed Circuit Board Assembly).
Original Equipment Manufacturers, contrasted with ODMs in the assembly process.
Describes the seamless design of Rubin that simplifies assembly.
